title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Adda247 Global Group

jsonLd.title: Career Opportunity Teacher at Adda247 Global Group
jsonLd.description:
Adda247 Global Group, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Teacher for our Meerut operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Adda247 Global Group:
Adda247 Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Meerut, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Adda247 Global Group!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
